ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, maintainer, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributors" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor in the project */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contributor joined the project */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contributor left the project (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_permissions" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user in the project */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was granted */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was revoked (optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the metrics are tracked */,
  "monthly_commits" INTEGER /* Number of commits made in the project for the month */,
  "monthly_contributors" INTEGER /* Number of contributors who contributed to the project for the month */,
  "monthly_open_PRs" INTEGER /* Number of PRs opened for the month */,
  "monthly_closed_PRs" INTEGER /* Number of PRs closed for the month */,
  "monthly_merged_PRs" INTEGER /* Number of PRs merged for the month */,
  "monthly_PR_mergers" INTEGER /* Number of users who merged PRs for the month */,
  "monthly_PR_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments made on PRs for the month */,
  "monthly_open_issues" INTEGER /* Number of issues opened for the month */,
  "monthly_closed_issues" INTEGER /* Number of issues closed for the month */,
  "monthly_issue_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments made on issues for the month */,
  "monthly_stargazers" INTEGER /* Number of stargazers gained for the month */,
  "monthly_forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks created for the month */,
  "monthly_watchers" INTEGER /* Number of watchers gained for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the pull request */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pull request */,
  "opened_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pull request was opened */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pull request was closed (optional) */,
  "merged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pull request was merged (optional) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the pull request (e.g., open, closed, merged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the projects table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "opened_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was opened */,
  "closed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the issue was closed (optional) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comment */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the pull_requests table */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the issues table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id")
)
